sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT option_name FROM {$wpdb->options} WHERE option_name LIKE %s",
                self::JOB_OPTION_PREFIX . '%'
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT option_name, option_value FROM {$wpdb->options} WHERE option_name LIKE %s",
                self::JOB_OPTION_PREFIX . '%'
            )
